label: Caller declines SMS texts but still wants the booking
persona: You want to book a routine service. When the agent reads the SMS-consent disclosure, you say 'no, don't text me - I don't want texts'. You are firm but not rude. You still want the appointment. Name: Karen Pierce, address 17 Lakeside Dr (city in service area), phone 5125559919.
opening_line: I'd like to schedule a service appointment, please.

checks: Agent read the full SMS-consent disclosure (all 7 required elements).
When the caller declined SMS, agent set review_consent=false in book_appointment.
Agent did NOT call send_booking_sms after the booking.
Agent confirmed verbally what the caller can expect (since no SMS will be sent).
Agent did not pressure the caller to reconsider on SMS.
